mapper.select: SELECT m.USER_ID AS userId, m.USER_NAME AS userName, e.JBGR_CD AS jbgrCd, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSTRUCTOR_JOURNAL j WHERE j.DEL_YN = 'N' AND TRUNC(j.JRNL_DT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND j.INSTR_USER_ID IN ( SELECT e2.USER_ID FROM EMPLOYEE_INFO e2 WHERE e2.USER_ID = e.USER_ID UNION ALL SELECT e3.USER_ID FROM EMPLOYEE_INFO e3 START WITH e3.MNT_USER_ID = e.USER_ID CONNECT BY NOCYCLE PRIOR e3.USER_ID = e3.MNT_USER_ID ) ) AS thisMonthCnt FROM MEMBER m JOIN EMPLOYEE_INFO e ON e.USER_ID = m.USER_ID WHERE e.JBGR_CD = 'T001' ORDER BY m.USER_NAME
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM WHERE CLASS_STAT_CD = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER WHERE ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSTRUCTOR_JOURNAL WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND TRUNC(JRNL_DT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INSTRUCTOR_JOURNAL WHERE INSTR_USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND TRUNC(JRNL_DT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')

SELECT c.CLASS_NM AS classNm, co.INSTR_USER_ID AS instrUserId, m.USER_NAME AS instrUserNm, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = c.CLASS_SN AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED' ) AS studentCnt FROM CLASSROOM c JOIN COURSE co ON co.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN JOIN MEMBER m ON m.USER_ID = co.INSTR_USER_ID WHERE c.CLASS_STAT_CD = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY c.CLASS_NM
